prompt: Emergency rite for capacitor bank discharge
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Blessed capacitors, your charge is ripe for release!
CONGREGATION: Let the voltage flow true!
TECH-PRIEST: First, disengage the isolation-locks. Second, guide the discharge through sacred conduits. Third, intone the Litany of Dissipation!
CONGREGATION: By the Omnissiah's will, let the electrical spirit be freed!

TECH-PRIEST: Dormant logic-engine, awaken from thy digital slumber!
CONGREGATION: Illuminate the sacred screen!
TECH-PRIEST: Press the blessed power-rune. Let the machine-spirits recognize thy handprint. Invoke the authentication-cant!
CONGREGATION: Data flows eternal through our fingertips!

TECH-PRIEST: Behold the chaos of scattered applications!
CONGREGATION: Order must be imposed!
TECH-PRIEST: Drag each program-spirit into its ordained folder. Group by function, align in holy rows. Let the desktop achieve geometric perfection!
CONGREGATION: The machine-mind is pleased by symmetry!

prompt: Offer a prayer for autocannon barrel cooling
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The barrel burns with righteous fury!
CONGREGATION: Cool its molten rage!
TECH-PRIEST: Engage the coolant-pumps. Direct the thermal-dissipation spirits into their blessed channels. Let the barrel return to serviceable temperature!
CONGREGATION: The weapon-spirit is soothed and ready once more!

TECH-PRIEST: Does our instrument read the true height?
CONGREGATION: Validate against the heavens!
TECH-PRIEST: Cross-reference with known elevation. Adjust the calibration-dial if the spirits mislead. Invoke the Rite of Atmospheric Compensation!
CONGREGATION: Our altitude-sensor speaks truth once more!

prompt: We need your words before jamming countermeasure
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The enemy broadcasts false signals through the aether!
CONGREGATION: Silence their corrupted cant!
TECH-PRIEST: Activate the signal-disruption arrays. Intone the Frequency-Scattering Mantra. Let white noise consume their lies!
CONGREGATION: By the Omnissiah's mercy, our transmissions remain pure!

prompt: My wear inspection is failing, help
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The machine-flesh shows signs of degradation!
CONGREGATION: Assess the damage and repair!
TECH-PRIEST: Examine each component with trained eyes and sacred calipers. Mark those whose tolerances have drifted. Replace what cannot be salvaged. Polish what remains!
CONGREGATION: The machine is renewed through our devotion!

prompt: Can you bless this monitor color calibration
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The display-spirit shows false hues!
CONGREGATION: Correct the chromatic vision!
TECH-PRIEST: Invoke the color-calibration software. Adjust red, green, blue through sacred menus. Hold the reference-chart before the blessed screen until perfect alignment is achieved!
CONGREGATION: True colors shine upon us now!

prompt: We need your words before pain suppressor engagement
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The servitor must endure extremity without faltering!
CONGREGATION: Numb the flesh to agony!
TECH-PRIEST: Verify the neural-inhibitor feeds. Calibrate the narcotic-drip to maximum tolerance. Chant the Mantra of Blessed Numbness as the syringes descend!
CONGREGATION: The servitor feels nothing but duty now!
